overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit futuristic city. The player moves through wet streets under overpasses, crosses intersections, and walks past various storefronts with vibrant holographic advertisements and neon signs reflecting off the rain-slicked pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered street under elevated highway overpass

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the concrete overpass toward the illuminated intersection ahead

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass spanning the street above
vibrant purple neon light strips mounted on the left wall
illuminated hotel sign with Japanese characters and blue neon
large red neon sign reading MOORE TECHNOLOGIES at the end of the street
rain-slicked asphalt street reflecting the neon lights

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive concrete highway overpass in a futuristic city. Purple neon lights illuminate the left wall while a large red MOORE TECHNOLOGIES sign glows in the distance. The wet asphalt reflects the vibrant neon lighting as the camera moves steadily forward through the sheltered corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: major urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalk

events.description: exits covered overpass area into open intersection with bright red neon signage
crossing the street at the white striped pedestrian crosswalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection while navigating around pedestrians with umbrellas

notable_agents.action: person holding black umbrella waiting at the crosswalk edge
two people walking together on the opposite sidewalk

tall traffic signal pole with pedestrian crossing lights

tall vertical digital advertisement screen

segments.scene_description: Emerging from under the overpass into an open intersection dominated by the massive red MOORE TECHNOLOGIES sign. The camera crosses the white-striped pedestrian crosswalk, passing pedestrians with umbrellas and approaching yellow benches on the opposite side. Traffic lights and digital billboards frame the crossing.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with public seating and industrial architecture

events.description: steps onto sidewalk after crossing the street, passing yellow benches

agents.ego_description: walking along the concrete sidewalk past public amenities and industrial structures

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase leading up to an elevated walkway
large screen displaying OUT WITH THE OLD IN WITH THE NEW
large yellow industrial ventilation pipes running up the building
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags
large rectangular planter containing small trees with red foliage

segments.scene_description: Walking along the sidewalk past bright yellow benches and a graffiti-covered wall. To the right, a large digital billboard displays advertisements above concrete stairs, while industrial exhaust pipes rise alongside the building. The area features sparse pedestrian activity and red-leafed trees in concrete planters.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with neon storefronts

events.description: lighting shifts to dominant green and orange neon from restaurant storefronts
passing under covered awning with vending machines and outdoor seating

agents.ego_description: walking under the covered walkway past various neon-lit shops and vending machines

notable_agents.action: person standing near the green neon sign looking at storefront
group of people walking along the street beyond the railing

entered.detail: restaurant entrance with bright orange and red neon lighting
metal and glass awning covering the pedestrian walkway
blue painted metal railing separating walkway from street
vertical green neon sign reading LUCKY
illuminated vending machine advertising burritos and sandwiches
neon sign with Korean text and OPEN in bright orange

segments.scene_description: The walkway becomes covered by an awning and is lined with vibrant neon storefronts. Green and orange neon signs illuminate various restaurants and shops, including a burrito vending machine. The blue metal railing runs along the left side separating the walkway from the street traffic, while the lighting creates a dense cyberpunk atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: large intersection with colorful striped crosswalk

events.description: exits covered walkway and approaches wide intersection with tall buildings
crossing the street at the yellow striped pedestrian crosswalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the final intersection with yellow striped crosswalk while navigating through pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in green outfit walking ahead into the crosswalk
group of three pedestrians crossing from the left side

entered.detail: pedestrian crossing with bold yellow and black diagonal stripes
skyscraper with illuminated windows and neon signage including SUSHI
traffic signal showing green light
large circular holographic advertisement with a dog face and POOCHES text
red neon sign reading SUSHI on the building facade

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway into a massive open intersection surrounded by towering skyscrapers. The camera crosses the distinctive yellow-striped crosswalk, passing under a green traffic light. A large circular holographic sign advertising POOCHES dominates the right side, while a SUSHI neon sign glows on the left building. The scene is bustling with pedestrians crossing in various directions.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered concrete underpass into the sprawling, neon-drenched heart of a futuristic city intersection. It begins moving through a dark corridor beneath a highway overpass, where purple neon and a distant red Moore Technologies sign reflect off the wet asphalt. As the camera emerges from the shadows, it crosses a white-striped pedestrian crossing into an open area characterized by yellow benches, graffiti-covered walls, and industrial exhaust pipes. The scene then shifts into a covered walkway lined with vibrant green and orange storefronts and a burrito vending machine, separated from the street by a blue metal railing. Finally, the camera exits the awning to enter a massive, bustling intersection surrounded by towering skyscrapers, passing under a green traffic light beneath a giant circular Pooches hologram and a glowing sushi sign.
